creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #2)
Unfortunately, they don't have nice looking changelog
Only github releases page - https://github.com/google/jsonnet/releases


So in particular, these are pages describing changes happened between 0.18.0 to 0.20.0:
https://github.com/google/jsonnet/releases/tag/v0.19.0
https://github.com/google/jsonnet/releases/tag/v0.19.1
https://github.com/google/jsonnet/releases/tag/v0.20.0
